snapshots.notes: Initial snapshot, hand-copied from Python-Model-OT-Control v1.1.0 _vendored_models/swat/. Regression target for issue #4 — V_h was anti-anabolic. Superseded by the V_h-anabolic structural fix below.

V_h-anabolic structural fix. V_h removed from u_W and routed through the entrainment-amplitude factor. Three new parameters (lambda_amp_W=5, lambda_amp_Z=8, V_n_scale=2). V_c_max=3-hour clinical threshold for phase pathology. The earlier 'Option C / Option D' label is now redundant — there is one SWAT, this one. Pending CI re-tag.
